_comment: Confirmation ledger for customer-facing claims. Nothing here changes rendering; it records what the owner must confirm before launch. Items marked pending correspond to data-confirm="pending" attributes in index.html and must be confirmed or removed before DEMO_MODE is turned off.

founded.note: Public research only. Not shown on the page until confirmed.

hours.note: Shown with a call-to-confirm caveat. Verify with owner before launch.

pending_owner_confirmation: Fault code reading as a stand-alone service

reviews.source: Verbatim Google reviews, operator-collected 2026-07-13, typos preserved
reviews.note: Reviewer first names must be verified against the live Google listing before launch; until then attribution reads 'Google review'. No star rating or review count is printed anywhere.

gallery.note: Photo slots only. Populate exclusively with business-owned or owner-approved photos. Never AI-generated or stock imagery presented as the shop's work.
